core_payload.content:
# Symphony Retry Entry

## 1. Role
Symphony Retry Entry will become the expressive quiet-recovery object for orchestration, capturing why work is being retried, which lane may continue, and how failures should return to the operator without duplicative noise.

## 2. Future Retry Contract
Retry state will carry lane-aware policy, degraded-mode continuation rules, assignment-aware return paths, and calmer operator behavior for recoverable failures. Recovery will be inspectable and deliberate rather than a thin timer wrapper.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Trustworthy automation will be able to fail and recover without feeling chaotic. Retry behavior will preserve continuity, attribution, and clarity even when multiple execution lanes and review surfaces are involved.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Symphony Retry Entry supports To Dig Deep by making recovery governed instead of improvised.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Symphony Retry Entry defines the future quiet-recovery object for orchestration: lane-aware retry policy, degraded-mode continuation, clearer assignment return paths, and calmer operator-visible handling of recoverable failure.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
